title: T-055 — Allergen gate second-sign Server Action (V-QA-ALLERGEN-001/002)
prompt:
# T-055 — Allergen gate second-sign Server Action

PRD: §11.6 V-QA-ALLERGEN-001/002, §10.3 consumer allergen_changeover_gate_v1 (08-PROD owner), §16.3 09-QA writes signed_by
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Action signSecondAllergenGate to perform the 09-QA second sign on an 08-PROD-owned allergen_changeover_validations row, enforcing dual-sign SoD (V-QA-ALLERGEN-001) + ATP threshold gate (V-QA-ALLERGEN-002) + override audit, reusing T-039 ESignBlock + dualSign primitive.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/server/quality/allergenGates/signActions.ts — signSecondAllergenGate, rejectAllergenGate, overrideAllergenGateBlock.
2. signSecondAllergenGate: enforce V-QA-ALLERGEN-001 (second signer userId != first signer; second signer role in {quality_lead, shift_lead, hygiene_lead}); enforce V-QA-ALLERGEN-002 (server-fetched lab_results.pass_flag for ATP swab must be true if risk_level >= medium — read directly from lab_results, do NOT recompute on client); update allergen_changeover_validations setting second_signed_by + second_signature_hash + validation_result='approved' (08-PROD column owner; 09-QA writes per §16.3); emit quality.allergen_gate.approved.
3. rejectAllergenGate: set validation_result='rejected' + reject_reason; emit quality.allergen_gate.rejected.
4. overrideAllergenGateBlock: when V-QA-ALLERGEN-002 ATP fail blocks approve, allow override only if risk_level='low' (from 08-PROD risk rule); requires justification min 10 chars + e-sign; emit quality.allergen_gate.override_approved with override audit row in allergen_gate_overrides table (separate audit log per translation-notes-quality §M-11).
5. Permissions reserved: quality.allergen_gate.sign_second, quality.allergen_gate.reject, quality.allergen_gate.override.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/allergenGates/signActions.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/allergenGates/__tests__/signActions.test.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0145_allergen_gate_overrides_audit.sql [create]
- packages/rbac/src/permissions.enum.ts [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given signSecondAllergenGate where secondSignerUserId === first_signed_by, when called, then 409 error.code='V-QA-ALLERGEN-001' and the row is unchanged
2. Given risk_level='medium' AND the corresponding ATP lab_results.pass_flag=false, when signSecondAllergenGate is called without override, then 422 error.code='V-QA-ALLERGEN-002' and validation_result stays unchanged
3. Given overrideAllergenGateBlock with risk_level='low' AND justification.length=15 AND valid e-sign, when called, then validation_result='approved', an allergen_gate_overrides row is inserted with the justification, and quality.allergen_gate.override_approved is emitted; for risk_level='high', the override action returns 403 error.code='OVERRIDE_NOT_PERMITTED'
4. Given rejectAllergenGate with reject_reason='cleaning incomplete', when called, then validation_result='rejected' + reject_reason persisted and quality.allergen_gate.rejected emits with the reject_reason

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: signActions.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before code
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test allergenGates/signActions'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass T-039 ESignBlock + dualSign primitive (audit B §3 red-line: single sign surface)
- Do not recompute ATP pass on client — read lab_results.pass_flag server-side (translation-notes §M-11)
- Do not allow override on risk_level='medium' or higher (only 'low' allows override per Q6 / 08-PROD risk rule)
- 09-QA writes ONLY to second_signed_by / second_signature_hash / validation_result / reject_reason — never touch first_signed_by (08-PROD owner) or other columns (§16.3)

pipeline_inputs.description: 09-QA second-sign + reject + override Server Actions on 08-PROD-owned allergen_changeover_validations, enforcing V-QA-ALLERGEN-001/002 + reuse of T-039 dual-sign primitive + override audit table.
pipeline_inputs.details: signSecondAllergenGate enforces SoD (V-QA-ALLERGEN-001) and ATP gate (V-QA-ALLERGEN-002 reads lab_results.pass_flag from T-050). overrideAllergenGateBlock allows approve when ATP fails only if risk_level='low' (08-PROD rule) AND justification.length>=10 AND e-sign; logs to allergen_gate_overrides table (migration 0145). rejectAllergenGate sets validation_result='rejected' + reject_reason. All 3 emit quality.allergen_gate.* outbox events. Permissions: quality.allergen_gate.sign_second, reject, override. 09-QA writes ONLY to second_signed_by/second_signature_hash/validation_result/reject_reason per §16.3.
out_of_scope: Do not implement allergen_changeover_validations table (08-PROD owner)
Do not implement first-sign flow (08-PROD owner)
acceptance_criteria: Given signSecondAllergenGate where secondSignerUserId === first_signed_by, when called, then 409 error.code='V-QA-ALLERGEN-001' and the row is unchanged
Given risk_level='medium' AND the ATP lab_results.pass_flag=false, when signSecondAllergenGate runs without override, then 422 error.code='V-QA-ALLERGEN-002' and validation_result stays unchanged

Given overrideAllergenGateBlock with risk_level='low' + justification.length=15 + valid e-sign, when called, then validation_result='approved', an allergen_gate_overrides row exists with the justification, and quality.allergen_gate.override_approved emits; for risk_level='high', override returns 403 error.code='OVERRIDE_NOT_PERMITTED'
Given rejectAllergenGate with reject_reason set, when called, then validation_result='rejected' + reject_reason persisted and quality.allergen_gate.rejected emits with reject_reason
test_strategy: RED: signActions.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before code
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter web test allergenGates/signActions'

Do not recompute ATP pass on client — read lab_results.pass_flag server-side
Override allowed ONLY for risk_level='low' (08-PROD rule, Q6)
